name: write_aie_intf_constraints
short_description: Writes aie interface placement information as constraints file.
full_help:
write_aie_intf_constraints

Description: 
Writes aie interface placement information as constraints file.

Syntax: 
write_aie_intf_constraints  [-no_fixed_only] [-cell <arg>] [-force] [-quiet]
                            [-verbose] [<file>]

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-no_fixed_only]  Export fixed and non-fixed placement (by default only 
                    fixed placement is exported)
  [-cell]           AIE IP Name for which constraints to be written)
  [-force]          Overwrite existing file.
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<file>]          Output AIE Interface constraints file.

Categories: 
AIE, FileIO
